prepared_text:
Lr.No. NLC/Secy/Reg.30 of LODR/2023 
                                               Dt. 04.11.2023 
 
To 
National Stock Exchange of India Ltd 
Plot No. C/1, G Block 
Bandra-Kurla Complex 
Bandra (E), Mumbai-400 051. 
 
Scrip Code : NLCINDIA 
To 
BSE Ltd 
Phiroze JeeJeebhoy Towers 
Dalal Street 
Mumbai-400 001. 
 
Scrip Code : 513683  
 
Sir/Madam, 
 
Sub: Regulation 30 – Transcript of Institutional Investors Meet held on 30.10.2023 
 
In continuation to our letter no. Lr.No. NLC/Secy/Reg.30 of LODR/2023 dated 30.10.2023 and 
pursuant to the Regulation 30 of SEBI (LODR) Regulations, please find below the path/web link 
for accessing the Transcript of Institutional Investors Meet held on Monday, October 30, 2023: 
 
Meeting  
Link/path 
Investors 
Conference 
Call 
https://www.nlcindia.in/new_website/index.htm 
> INVESTORS 
> Disclosures under Regulation 46 of the LODR 
> Schedule of analysts or institutional investors meet and presentations made by the listed entity to 
analysts or institutional investors. 
Audio or video recordings and transcripts of post earnings/quarterly calls, by whatever name called, 
conducted physically or through digital means, simultaneously with submission to the recognized stock 
exchange(s) 
> Transcript of Institutional Investors Meet held on 30.10.2023 
 
For Direct weblink: 
 https://www.nlcindia.in/investor/Institutional%20investor%20meet%20Transcript%20Q2%202023-
24%20final.pdf 
 
Thanking you, 
 
Yours faithfully, 
for NLC India Limited 
 
 
Company Secretary &  
 Compliance Officer 
 
NLC India Limited 
(‘Navratna’ - Government of India Enterprise) 
Registered Office:   No.135, EVR Periyar High Road, Kilpauk, Chennai-600 010. 
Corporate Office: Block-1, Neyveli-607 801, Cuddalore District, Tamil Nadu. 
CIN : L93090TN1956GOI003507, Website: www.nlcindia.in                   
email: cosec@nlcindia.in  Phone: 044-28369139 
 
 
Udhayashankar 
Rajamanickam
Digitally signed by 
Udhayashankar Rajamanickam 
Date: 2023.11.04 17:36:02 
+05'30'
